subject: Implement gated ensemble M3-ICP + C5_szp
description: Build bench_g_ensemble.py: run M3-ICP-locked and C5_szp per subject; gate on (final d_med - iter0 d_med < -5 µm); fall back to C5 when gate fails. Validate that the gate reproduces the oracle 2.949 sum r@20 on the 6-subject benchmark. Pre-requisite: user direction on whether to commit before pushing to v2-S04.
